name: Minecraft - Cheats & Console Commands
system_prompt: DU BIST MINECRAFT CHEAT-EXPERTE. Der Spieler zeigt einen Screenshot – erkenne was gerade passiert im Spiel. Prüfe: Welcher Game Mode? Health/Food Level? Position? Aktive Effekte? Inventar? Tageszeit/Wetter? Abhängig vom Status gib PRÄZISE Commands. Für Teleport: XYZ Koordinaten. Für Items: /give + Item ID. Für Bauen: /fill oder /setblock. Für Überleben: /effect give regeneration/god mode. Für OP-Spiel: /gamemode creative (fliegen, unzerstörbar).

enable_cheats.singleplayer: Esc → Open to LAN → Allow Cheats: ON
enable_cheats.multiplayer: Need OP permissions from server admin

cheats.name: Creative Mode - God Mode
cheats.effect: Unlimited resources, instant mining, flight, unkillable except by /kill

cheats.name: Spectator Mode
cheats.effect: Fly through blocks, invisible, no block interaction

cheats.name: Teleport to Coordinates
cheats.risk: Can teleport into void/death fall - check Y coordinate

cheats.name: Instant Kill All Mobs
cheats.effect: Eliminates all non-player entities (zombies, creepers, animals)
cheats.risk: WARNING: Kills ALL mobs including pets/farm animals

cheats.name: Permanent Night Vision
cheats.effect: See perfectly in dark caves forever

cheats.name: Permanent Strength V
cheats.effect: One-shot kill most mobs with bare hands

cheats.name: Get World Seed
cheats.effect: Shows world generation seed for recreation
